ksa_text: Skill in conducting AI conformity assessments under the EU AI Act, including risk classification determination, technical documentation evaluation, and compliance assessment against applicable high-risk AI system requirements.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

onet.top_element_label: Evaluating Information to Determine Compliance with Standards

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Capability building for digital, data and technology

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-S-008 (RC, Skill) maps to Bioinformatics Technician scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.6000 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.600, nist_ai_rmf=0.584, dcwf=0.410. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.6000 for weak fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA RC-S-008 (RC, composite 0.6000) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.6000 for RC domain provides sufficient cross-framework signal per GDPR, CCPA, SOX; compliance competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data handling obligations, not compliance program ownership. Strong signal across eu_ai_act=0.600, nist_ai_rmf=0.584, dcwf=0.410 indicates genuine competency overlap despite absence of direct analytics terminology. External ground truth upholds inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. Score 0.6000 exceeds external evidence threshold for RC domain inclusion in Bioinformatics Technician.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.6000, domain RC, scope weak fit. High confidence.
